name: Campus Exchange
description: A lightweight Rails web app for students to lend, borrow, and coordinate items within their campus community

RAILS_MASTER_KEY.description: Rails master key for encrypted credentials (required for Twilio). Set this in Heroku Pipeline settings.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth client ID for authentication

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Google OAuth client secret for authentication

CLOUDINARY_URL.description: Cloudinary URL for image uploads (optional in CI)

scripts.test: bundle exec rake spec && bundle exec cucumber
